Adds additional personas and a set of process templates/checklists to improve role clarity, handoffs, and delivery consistency.

Changes:
- Update docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md to add Additional Personas (Tech Lead, Engineering Manager, Delivery Lead/Scrum Master, DevOps/Platform Engineer, UX Researcher/Designer, Security Liaison).
- Add docs/templates/process-templates.md with PR checklist, risk register template, release checklist, retrospective action template, and role handoff checklist.
- Add docs/process-improvements.md summarizing the improvements and rationale.

These documentation changes address gaps identified in issue #4 by clarifying ownership, providing templates to reduce friction, and improving onboarding/discoverability of processes.

Relates to #4
